source_files: experimental/holograph-runtime/adapters/docker_adapter.py — runs `docker ps -a --format {{json .}}` every 10s, emits one Thinga per container
notes: Visual: blue-emissive tile (Docker brand color 0x0096ED = 38637) with a darker base border (0x249EDD = 2400477). Distinct from server-process green so a screen can tell process vs container at a glance.
Adapter publishes facets: { name, image, status, ports } via the process-observer facet (reused — both kinds share the same data-container shape today).
status_color_running/paused/exited reserved for the future container-status-color facet that paints tile material by container status string.
scan_interval_seconds = 10 matches the adapter's poll cadence.

Substrate held shape this iter — the docker→process relationship (containers run processes) is purely informational on the facet data side; no cross-Thing reach required yet. Strike 0/3 toward actor-lift remains.
